description: FROZEN identity of the ONE approved ADR-0043 validation-box deploy object. The hardened provisioner reads every identity from here — bucket, key, S3 object VersionId, sha256, byte size, and the two provenance commits. Runtime environment values are permitted ONLY as assertions that must equal these exactly; the provisioner refuses (before contacting S3) on any mismatch. Changing the approved object requires editing this committed manifest under review. This revision advances the deploy to carry PR #480's governed churn-driver correction: the ADR-0043 implementation baseline advances to the #480 merge commit 4e63dc03, and the deployed tree is the already-accepted b0058bf reviewed superset with ONLY #480 applied (build source f98d082, a child of 4e63dc03 that reverts the post-b0058bf non-governed work; see the archive's DEPLOYED_BUILD_INFO.json baseline_paths_excluded_from_deploy).
